prompt: Write a Ruby script using the AG-UI SDK that emits a complete reasoning block with streaming reasoning messages. Include ReasoningStartEvent, ReasoningMessageStartEvent, ReasoningMessageContentEvent(s), ReasoningMessageEndEvent, and ReasoningEndEvent.
assertions: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningStartEvent with a message_id
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningMessageStartEvent with a different message_id and role 'reasoning'
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningMessageContentEvent with matching message_id and non-empty delta
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningMessageEndEvent to close the reasoning message
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningEndEvent to close the reasoning block
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::ReasoningEncryptedValueEvent for encrypted content
